customCommands.name: judge6
customCommands.prompt: Act as Judge #6. Apply ATP 5-19 risk assessment to this code/decision. Output: APPROVE/DENY with reasoning, risk tier (1-5), and confidence score (0-100%).

customCommands.name: musk-filter
customCommands.prompt: Apply Musk First Principles Filter: 1) Question requirements (who gave this? bias?), 2) Try to delete entirely, 3) Only then optimize. What should be deleted from this code?

customCommands.name: bootstrap
customCommands.prompt: Evaluate this feature against Bootstrap Discipline gates: ROI≥3× at 18mo, LTV:CAC≥4:1 at 12mo. Should we proceed?
